title: TLS handshake succeeds but the certificate is expired
description_md:
`app.internal` is served over TLS by nginx on port 8443. Connections still complete, but monitoring flags the certificate as expired -- nobody rotated it before it ran out. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), confirm the certificate's actual validity dates, generate a fresh one, and get nginx serving it.

You're done when the certificate nginx is actively serving on port 8443 is currently valid (not expired).
